violations.text: Plastic Utensils in the service window area were observed stored/displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Utensils were rearranged and stored properly at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The wall(s) and Ceiling in the dish area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue/dust due to the wall mounted fan. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Inspector discussed having extra scoops to cycle through (wash, rinse, sanitize) to avoid storing in stagnant water. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
